rationale: This "relaxing puzzle satisfaction" archetype is a fundamental mismatch for Flappy Dunk: the game's DNA is energetic/competitive reflex-tapping with VS matchmaking, while the hook explicitly promises calm, stylus-based puzzle-solving — staging this would mislead installs and tank D1 retention. The sky-blue/orange Bus Jam palette also clashes with Flappy Dunk's beige+magenta identity, and there's no way to honestly demonstrate hoop physics inside a "slide buses to relax" frame. Only the broad hypercasual audience overlaps; do not adapt this archetype unless you strip it down to just the "Have you played a game that..." VO hook over native Flappy Dunk gameplay.
